summary: Archetype roster exposes the decide() function and the static profile data that Table mode invokes whenever a non-hero seat must act.

decide.name: decide
decide.shape: (game_state: GameState, profile: ArchetypeProfile, rng_seed: number) => AgentDecision
decide.GameState_shape_summary: Read-only structural snapshot of the live hand: street, board, seat positions, stacks, current bet, pot, action history, and the agent's own hole cards (the agent reasons over its own hand only). Note: section-5 owns the canonical GameState type — section-4 only reads from a documented subset.
decide.ArchetypeProfile_shape: { id, name, preflop_frequencies, postflop_heuristics, contrast_with_gto } (per section-4 schema)
decide.purpose: Pure function. Same inputs produce same output. Sizing is required when action is 'raise' (in chips, must be >= min-raise constraint). 'rationale_tag' is optional debug info.

list_archetypes.name: listArchetypes
list_archetypes.purpose: Used at table-init time to assign 8 non-hero seats.

data_passed_not_logic: Table passes a game-state snapshot, a profile reference, and a seed. Section-4 returns a structured decision. Section-4 does not call back into table; table does not implement decision logic.

section-5_owns: applying the decision to the table state

test_seam: Unit test: for each profile in listArchetypes(), call decide() twice with identical (state, profile, seed); assert deeply-equal AgentDecision and assert profile object is unchanged.
